scripts.predev: powershell -Command "$pid3000 = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($pid3000) { Stop-Process -Id $pid3000 -Force; Write-Host 'Stopped process on port 3000' }"
scripts.prebackend: powershell -Command "$pid8089 = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8089 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($pid8089) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8089 -Force; Write-Host 'Stopped process on port 8089' }"
